## What's Inaccurate

Describe the clinical inaccuracy you found.

## Where You Found It

- Question text or topic area:
- Screenshot if possible:

## What's Correct

Provide the accurate clinical information.

## Source/Citation

Please include a reference (textbook, guideline, journal article) if available.

## Severity

- [ ] Could lead to unsafe patient care recommendations
- [ ] Incorrect but unlikely to cause harm
- [ ] Minor wording issue

## Your Background (Optional)

Are you a nurse, nursing student, educator, or other healthcare professional? This helps us prioritize reports.
